This variable is coded as such: 0 if it is reported that nothing is done with feces, 1 for any other response, including no response.

This is what is used in the models shown below. It is coded as: full_pen if all animals are always penned, partial_pen if at least one type of animal is penned during the day or night, no_pen if no animals are ever penned, and no_response for no response about penning.

There is one outlier in Kisumu_low, (270,360], with touch_animal = 79. (Id_city = 546_Kisumu).

There is one outlier in Kisumu_mid, (0-90], with touch_animal_feces = 58. (Id_city = 575_Kisumu).
